executive_summary: Causal graph analysis of rheumatoid arthritis (EFO: EFO_0000685) identified 488 significant causal edges spanning 244 therapeutic targets. Top-ranked targets are NFKBIE, UQCC2, ACTR3. 196 gene–program β estimate(s) use the `provisional_virtual` evidence tier (in silico / weak perturbation support); other evidence streams may still be experimental.

top_target_narratives:
NFKBIE downregulates disease-promoting RA_NMF_P02, RA_NMF_P03, RA_NMF_P04 → disease trait.
Evidence: GWAS + Perturb-seq.
Composite Ota estimate: γ_{NFKBIE→trait} = -1.897 (Tier1_Interventional).
Best compound: no approved drug (no in vitro activity data; Phase 0).

UQCC2 downregulates disease-promoting RA_NMF_P03, RA_NMF_P04, RA_NMF_P01 → disease trait.
Evidence: GWAS + Perturb-seq.
Composite Ota estimate: γ_{UQCC2→trait} = -1.629 (Tier1_Interventional).
Best compound: no approved drug (no in vitro activity data; Phase 0).

ACTR3 downregulates disease-promoting RA_NMF_P03, RA_NMF_P04, RA_NMF_P01 → disease trait.
Evidence: GWAS + Perturb-seq.
Composite Ota estimate: γ_{ACTR3→trait} = -1.436 (Tier1_Interventional).
Best compound: no approved drug (no in vitro activity data; Phase 0).
limitations: About 196 gene–program β rows are labelled `provisional_virtual` (in silico or weakly supported cell-model estimates). That label applies to those β edges, not to the entire analysis: GWAS/L2G and other tiers may still be experimentally grounded. Treat virtual-tier rows as hypothesis-generating. Full quantitative Perturb-seq β coverage may require local GEO GSE246756 downloads (~50GB; Replogle 2022) when not cached. Program γ estimates are context-dependent; validate lead findings experimentally.
warnings: IL6R: eQTL NES direction inconsistent with expected biology (IL-6 receptor drives synovitis; tocilizumab (approved 2010) blocks it)
